product_results.title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max, 256GB, White Titanium (Renewed)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone to be a good quality iPhone that works great and feels like new. The battery arrives at 100% with excellent battery health at 91%. The phone looks excellent and appears brand new. However, customers have mixed opinions on the screen condition and mostly dislike the charging experience.

authors_reviews.title: Nice phone
authors_reviews.text: Screen has little dent but it is ok with a screen protecterNice phone with 100% battery health
authors_reviews.author: ryan

authors_reviews.title: 10/10 company. Great looking phone wow!
authors_reviews.text: 10 out of 10 this company is awesome. iPhone 16 Pro Max came safe and sound looks amazing. Battery health is amazing. Great price. Thank you so much. I read lots of reviews before I went with the seller. I will recommend this company to anybody. Thanks again. I love my new iPhone.
authors_reviews.author: Rodney Haynes

authors_reviews.title: Much better than I thought
authors_reviews.text: I was expecting a very used phone but what I got was a phone in perfect order. Pleasantly surprised
authors_reviews.author: Mark B.

authors_reviews.title: Deceptive Wordplay: Dual-SIM and eSIM
authors_reviews.text: The product is listed with separate "Dual-SIM" and "eSIM" options at different prices. I chose "Dual-SIM", but received an eSIM‑only US model — no physical SIM tray at all.Yes, every modern iPhone supports 2 SIMs, so technically it can be called "Dual‑SIM", but that is misleading for anyone who expects a physical SIM slot. The phone itself is in decent condition, but the listing does not accurately reflect the hardware.Do check the model number (e.g., LL/A for US version) before ordering. If you need a physical SIM tray, be aware that this "Dual‑SIM" option may actually be the eSIM‑only version.
authors_reviews.author: Mengqi Wang

authors_reviews.title: Don’t listen to them, And I love my IPhone 16 Pro max Trust me
authors_reviews.text: Not bad!I know the iPhone 17 pro max dropped a while ago, this is just my opinion, the iPhone 17 pro max is dull and ugly yes, THE IPHONE 16 PRO MAX IS WAY WAY MORE EYE CATCHING AND BETTER LOOKING
authors_reviews.author: Zain

authors_reviews.title: No charge cord
authors_reviews.text: Looks like a great phone but came completely with no power and thankfully it came with no USB cord to charge it. So I guess I have to go buy a cord independently, but I’ve never seen a phone not come with a power cord. Hopefully once charged, it will be a good phone But for 1700 bucks yeah at least include the USB cord.
authors_reviews.author: Joe Zepedeo
